title: MyCandyShop Mint Imperials 500g - Mints Sweets Made with Natural Peppermint Oil - Sweets in bulk cheap - Made in the UK
features: MINTS SWEETS BULK - Made with pure peppermint oil, these imperial mints deliver an intense burst of cooling freshness that awakens your senses and refreshes your breath, leaving you feeling confidently energized for hours

BREATH FRESHENER SWEETS - Create a welcoming atmosphere in your reception area with these bulk mints & office sweets. These classic mint chews offer excellent value while creating an immediate impression of thoughtful care

EVENT ESSENTIAL - Make your special occasions memorable with these mini mints as sophisticated favours or add them to a mint imperials jar for sweet table decorations. These can be used as welcome sweets, reception sweets, wedding mints & restaurant mints

TRAVEL MINTS - Keep these mint sweets within reach during commutes, meetings, or travel. The convenient 500g pack fits easily in bags, desk drawers, and car consoles for instant freshness whenever needed

UK MADE INDIVIDUAL MINTS - Crafted in the UK using time-honored techniques, these imperial assorted mints maintain their robust flavour and smooth texture. The generous 500g mints bulk pack is smaller than mint imperials 1kg but still ensures you're stocked for every refreshment need
